name: California Rarebit
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 teaspoons butter in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add the white wine and heat until warm.
3. Stir in 12 ounces of mozzarella cheese and all of the parmesan cheese.
4. Heat until melted.
5. Add a small amount of the cheese mixture to the beaten egg, then add the egg back into the cheese.
6. Cook and stir for about 1 minute.
7. Add Worcestershire sauce and basil, keeping the sauce warm.
8. Sauté mushrooms in the remaining butter until just tender, then sprinkle with garlic powder and remove from heat.
9. Arrange toast points or triangles on individual heatproof plates.
10. Spoon the sauce over the toast, top with sautéed mushrooms, and sprinkle with remaining cheese.
11. Broil until bubbly.
